headerDisplay: Homebridge 2.0 plugin for Big Ass Fans (i6, es6, Haiku H/I, Haiku L)
footerDisplay: For details, see the [README](https://github.com/applemanj/homebridge-bigAssFans-2#readme). Whoosh is now native SwingMode in the fan tile. Fan Auto is now native in the fan tile via TargetFanState.

name.title: Platform Name
name.description: Display name for this Homebridge platform instance.

fans.title: Fans
fans.description: Add one entry for each Big Ass Fans / Haiku fan you want to expose to HomeKit.

name.title: Fan Name
name.description: Display name for this fan in HomeKit.

ip.title: Fan IP Address Or Hostname
ip.description: IP address, DNS hostname, or mDNS .local hostname for the fan.

mac.title: MAC Address
mac.description: MAC address from the Big Ass Fans app Wi-Fi settings.

showFanAutoSwitch.title: Fan Auto Switch (Legacy)
showFanAutoSwitch.description: Add a separate switch for Fan Auto in addition to the native fan-tile control.

showLightAutoSwitch.title: Light Auto Switch
showLightAutoSwitch.description: Add a switch for Light Auto mode when the fan has lights.

showDimToWarmSwitch.title: Dim To Warm Switch
showDimToWarmSwitch.description: Add a switch for Dim to Warm when supported by the fan.

showEcoModeSwitch.title: Eco Mode Switch
showEcoModeSwitch.description: Add a switch for Eco Mode when supported by the fan.

disableDirectionControl.title: Disable Direction Control
disableDirectionControl.description: Hide the fan direction control in HomeKit.

probeFrequency.title: Probe Frequency (ms)
probeFrequency.description: Keep-alive and state refresh interval in milliseconds. Set to 0 to disable probing.

noLights.title: Hide Light Controls
noLights.description: Hide all light-related services for this fan, including downlight, uplight, UVC, and standby LED controls.

showHumidity.title: Show Humidity Sensor
showHumidity.description: Expose the humidity sensor when supported by the fan.

showTemperature.title: Show Temperature Sensor
showTemperature.description: Expose the temperature sensor when supported by the fan.

downlightEquipped.title: Downlight Detection
downlightEquipped.description: Use Auto Detect unless the plugin guesses wrong. Force Present exposes a downlight; Force Hidden hides it.

uplightEquipped.title: Uplight Detection
uplightEquipped.description: Use Auto Detect unless the plugin guesses wrong. Force Present exposes an uplight; Force Hidden hides it.

showFanOccupancySensor.title: Show Fan Occupancy Sensor
showFanOccupancySensor.description: Expose the fan occupancy sensor when supported by the fan.

showLightOccupancySensor.title: Show Light Occupancy Sensor
showLightOccupancySensor.description: Expose the light occupancy sensor when supported by the fan.

showStandbyLED.title: Show Standby LED Controls
showStandbyLED.description: Expose night light / standby LED controls when supported by the fan. Hidden if Hide Light Controls is enabled.

enableIncrementalButtons.title: Enable +/- Buttons
enableIncrementalButtons.description: Add momentary +/- buttons for brightness and fan speed.

incrementalButtonsDelay.title: Incremental Button Reset Delay (ms)
incrementalButtonsDelay.description: Auto-reset delay for the optional +/- buttons in milliseconds.

enableDebugPort.title: Enable Debug Port
enableDebugPort.description: Enable a localhost-only TCP debug port for runtime debug level changes and detailed timing diagnostics. Leave off for normal use.
